hero.thesis: Capitalize on the booming podcast industry by offering a specialized editing service, catering to mid-tier podcasters who value quality but lack time.
hero.marketSize: The global podcasting market is projected to reach $41 billion by 2026, with over 2 million active podcasts needing regular editing services.
hero.payingEvidence: Many podcasters on platforms like Podchaser and Buzzsprout are actively seeking editing help, with freelancers earning $200–$400 per episode.

ninetyDay.title: Foundation Setup

actions.action: Select a business name and register your domain on Namecheap.
actions.success: Domain registered and business name secured.

actions.action: Set up a basic landing page on Webflow with a clear service offering.
actions.success: Landing page live with contact form.

actions.action: Join podcasting communities on Reddit (e.g., r/podcasting) and introduce your service.

ninetyDay.metric: 3 inquiries from the landing page or community posts.

actions.action: Create a list of 50 potential podcast clients using Apollo and LinkedIn.
Send personalized cold emails to each contact introducing your service.
Follow up on emails sent earlier in the week.
Use feedback from trial clients to refine your editing process.
Establish a client onboarding process in Notion.
Create a client feedback form using Typeform.
actions.success: Feedback form live and shared with clients.

ninetyDay.title: Marketing and Branding

actions.action: Design a professional logo using Canva.
actions.success: Logo created and uploaded to the website.

actions.action: Develop a content calendar for social media posts on Instagram and Twitter.
actions.success: Content calendar for the next month ready.

actions.action: Post your first content piece on Instagram and Twitter.
actions.success: First posts live on social media.

ninetyDay.metric: Increase in social media followers by 10%.

actions.action: Upgrade your Apollo plan to access more contacts.
actions.success: Plan upgraded and new contacts accessible.

actions.action: Send outreach emails to a new list of 100 podcast hosts.
actions.success: Outreach emails sent to new contacts.

actions.action: Join two new podcast-related Discord servers and share your service offerings.
actions.success: Active engagement in two Discord servers.

ninetyDay.title: Refinement and Efficiency

actions.action: Automate client scheduling using Calendly.
Analyze your editing process to identify time-savings opportunities.
actions.success: Process streamlined with 10% time saved per episode.

actions.action: Update your website with new testimonials and case studies.

ninetyDay.metric: 10% reduction in editing time per episode.

actions.action: Launch a paid ad campaign on LinkedIn targeting podcast producers.
Write a blog post on 'The Importance of Professional Podcast Editing' and publish on your website.
Share the blog post across all social media channels.
actions.success: Blog post shared on social media.

actions.action: Integrate an AI editing tool like Descript to enhance editing efficiency.
Conduct a training session with online resources to fully utilize Descript.
actions.success: Training completed and tool fully utilized.

actions.action: Test and compare editing quality between manual and AI-assisted processes.
Develop a loyalty program offering discounts for long-term clients.
Set up monthly check-ins with clients using Cal.com.
Send personalized thank-you notes to all current clients.
Attend an industry webinar on podcasting trends.
Connect with 10 industry leaders on LinkedIn and engage with their content.
Host a virtual meet-up for podcasters to discuss editing challenges.

ninetyDay.title: Revenue Diversification

actions.action: Develop a supplementary service offering, such as show notes writing.
actions.success: New service outlined and added to website.

actions.action: Reach out to current clients about the new service offering.
Create a bundle pricing option for editing and show notes.

ninetyDay.metric: Secure 1 client for the new service.

ninetyDay.title: Reflect and Adjust

actions.action: Review the past 11 weeks and evaluate what worked and what didn’t.
Adjust business strategies based on the evaluation.
Set goals for the next quarter and align your team (if applicable).
actions.success: Quarterly goals set and shared with the team.

ninetyDay.metric: Clear roadmap for the next quarter established.

toolStack.name: Apollo
toolStack.why: To build a robust list of potential podcast clients.

toolStack.name: Webflow
toolStack.why: To create a professional and customizable landing page.

toolStack.name: Calendly
toolStack.why: To streamline client scheduling and reduce back-and-forth emails.

toolStack.name: Descript
toolStack.why: To enhance editing efficiency with AI tools.

toolStack.name: Notion
toolStack.why: To organize client onboarding and manage project workflows.

toolStack.name: Typeform
toolStack.why: To gather client feedback easily and effectively.

channels: Discord Servers: Podcast Central, Audio Gurus
firstTenCustomers.script: Subject: Elevate Your Podcast Quality Hi [Name], I came across your podcast in the [Niche] space and was impressed by your content. I specialize in podcast editing and can help you enhance your audio quality, saving you time and boosting your listener engagement. Let's discuss how we can collaborate. Best, [Your Name]
firstTenCustomers.cadence: Initial email on Monday, follow-up on Thursday.

pricing.starter: $200 per episode for basic editing services.
pricing.growth: $300 per episode including enhanced sound design and faster turnaround.
pricing.premium: $400 per episode with comprehensive editing and show notes.
pricing.raisingRules: Raise prices by 10% when demand exceeds current client capacity.

failureModes: Underestimating editing time leading to missed deadlines.
Not keeping up with industry trends and tools resulting in outdated services.
Failing to secure repeat clients due to lack of retention strategy.
Pricing too low and unsustainable for the level of service offered.
Ignoring feedback from clients leading to stagnant service quality.
Spreading outreach too thin without targeting specific niches.

setup.llc: Use Stripe Atlas to form an LLC for liability protection and business legitimacy.
setup.payments: Set up Stripe to handle all client payments seamlessly.
setup.contracts: Draft a simple service agreement using Hellosign to formalize client relationships.
setup.insurance: Consider professional liability insurance with Hiscox for added security.

scaling: To scale from a solo operator to a small team, focus on hiring skilled editors who align with your quality standards. Start by training them on your processes using Notion as a training hub. Implement quality checks and feedback loops for continuous improvement. As you grow, delegate client communication and scheduling to a virtual assistant hired through platforms like Lovable. This frees up your time to focus on strategic growth and client acquisition. Invest in further automation tools such as n8n to streamline repetitive tasks, allowing your team to focus on delivering top-notch editing services. Continuously evaluate your service offerings and consider expanding into related services like podcast marketing to diversify revenue streams.
